site.title: Kooxda Shaqada Caalamiga ah ee Helitaanka
site.tagline: Laga soo bilaabo baahida loo qabo helitaanka dib u soo celinta dadweynaha
nav.label: Waxyaabaha aasaasiga ah
nav.languageNoMatch: Wax is waafajin ah ma jiraan
meta.home.description: IATF waxay u badaleysaa baahida dhabta ah ee marin u helidda keydka macluumaadka furan ee dadweynaha.
meta.projects.description: Raadso mashaariicda la heli karo ee dadweynaha ee lagu daabacay IATF.
meta.propose.description: Ka codso mashruuca helitaanka IATF adigoo adeegsanaya shabakada, emaylka, ama Discord.
meta.governance.description: Akhri sida IATF ay u aqbasho mashaariicda, u maamusho keydadka, iyo u ilaaliso shaqada dadweynaha.
meta.join.description: Siyaabo aad uga qeybqaadan karto IATF: ku darso koodh, turjume, tijaabi, ama dayactir mashruuc.
meta.accessibility.description: Sida ay IATF u dooneyso inay boggan u noqoto mid la heli karo iyo sida loo soo sheego caqabadaha helitaanka.
meta.transparency.description: Diiwaanada dadweynaha ee IATF: go'aamada, mashaariicda, iyo cusbooneysiinta ayaa si toos ah u furan.
actions.emailProjects: U dir boostada emailka ee mashaariicda
registry.empty.title: Wali ma jiraan wax mashruuc ah oo la daabacay
registry.empty.body: IATF waxay diyaarinaysaa mashruucyadeedii ugu horeeyay ee dadweynaha.
proposal.form.title: Codsi soo dir
proposal.form.body: Buuxi foomka hoose si aad codsi ugu dirto IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript ayaa loo baahan yahay si loo isticmaalo foomkan shabakadda. Haddii aan la heli karin, isticmaal emayl ama Discord halkii.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Soo gudbinta tooska ah laguma qaabeyn deegaankani. Foomkan wuxuu furayaa macaamiisha emaylkaaga halkii.
proposal.form.ready: Soo gudbinta aaminka ah waa diyaar. Markaad dirto codsiga, IATF waxay abuuri doontaa diiwaanka gelitaanka.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Fadlan buuxi baaritaanka ilaalinta spam ka hor intaadan dirin.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Badbaadada Spam-ka ayaa dhacday. Fadlan dib u buuxi baaritaanka ka hor intaadan dirin.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Ilaalinta Spam-ka hadda lama xaqiijin karo. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Badbaadinta Spam-ka waqtigii wuu dhammaaday. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Fadlan buuxi meelaha loo baahan yahay ka hor intaadan dirin.
proposal.form.success: Waad ku mahadsantahay. Codsigaaga waa la helay waxaana loo kaydiyay dib u eegis.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Haddii aad mar kale la xiriirto IATF codsigan ku saabsan, ku dar tixraaca hoose.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Waxbaa khaldamay markii aad diraysay codsiga. Fadlan mar kale isku day. Haddii ay dhibaatadu sii socoto, isticmaal emaylka.
project.detail.field.lastUpdated: Markii ugu dambeysay ee la cusbooneysiiyay
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Asalka Ingiriisiga caadiga ah, tarjumaadaha waxaa lagu dari karaa goor dambe
footer.label: Bogga hoose
footer.blurb: Shaqada la xiriirta helitaanka waa in ay fududaataa in la bilaabo, fududaato in la daabaco, fududna in la furo.
footer.source: Tixraaca heerarka helitaanka: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Isticmaalka macluumaadka ay bixiyaan dadka isticmaala tiknoolajiyada caawimaadda.
contact.label: Xiriirka
translation.label: Xaaladda turjumaadda
translation.source: Ingiriisku waa luuqada asalka ah ee boggan.
translation.humanReviewed: Turjumaadan waxaa dib u eegay qof si fiican u hadla.
translation.machineAssisted: Turjumaadkan waxaa caawiyay mashiinka oo weli si buuxda looma eegin af-haye ku hadla. Soo-jeedinta waa la soo dhaweynayaa iyada oo loo marayo GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Tarjumaadkan waxaa dib loo eegay ka hor inta aan la cusbooneysiinin asalka Ingiriisiga ugu dambeeyay waxaana laga yaabaa inuu u baahdo dib u eegis.
translation.report: Warbixin ku saabsan dhibaatada turjumaadda: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Waxaan ku iri:
